reviews.comment:
No me ayudaron mucho...no tienen convenios con ningún chapista.. bastante flojo estuvieron...

reviews.comment:
Las veces que voy están sin combustible.
El shop bien, hay cafés. Afuera tienen agua caliente para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
Every time I go, they're out of fuel.
The shop is good, they have coffee. Outside they have hot water for mate.

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargamos nafta en esa YPF, ahora en plenas vacaciones se quedan sin nafta!!

(Translated by Google)
We always fill up at that YPF station, and now, right in the middle of the holidays, they've run out of gas!!

reviews.comment:
No pude pagar con la app en la tienda... Sólo efectivo o débito, no me dieron explicaciones del por qué no funcionaba...

(Translated by Google)
I couldn't pay with the app in the store... Only cash or debit card. They didn't give me an explanation as to why it wasn't working...
